Computes shape/compactness/dispersal indices for a single terra
SpatRaster, treating a whole shape (however many disjoint patches or
holes it has) as a single combined shape - the raster- native sibling of
'shapeindices', which does the same thing for (multi)polygons via
constrained Delaunay triangulation. The shape is derived directly from
the raster's own values, optionally used as a density/mass field
throughout. Every index requires a planar (projected) coordinate
reference system, since the package's own point-based geometry
(line-crossing tests, pairwise distance accumulation, moment-tensor
calculations, circle-fitting) works directly in the raster's own x/y
coordinate space as if it were Cartesian - a geographic
(longitude/latitude) CRS is rejected with an error rather than silently
producing wrong results. Also exposes morphological operators (erosion,
dilation, opening, closing, top-hat, bottom-hat) as first-class
functions on 'terra' SpatRaster objects, filling a gap 'terra' itself
does not cover.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`bottomhat()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/bottomhat.md)
  : Bottom-hat (black-hat) transform of a terra SpatRaster
- [`closing()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/closing.md)
  : Morphological closing (dilate then erode) of a terra SpatRaster
- [`dilate()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/dilate.md) :
  Morphological dilation of a terra SpatRaster
- [`erode()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/erode.md) :
  Morphological erosion of a terra SpatRaster
- [`gm_convexity_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_convexity_index.md)
  : Convexity/dispersal index of a terra raster
- [`gm_depth_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_depth_index.md)
  : Depth index for a terra raster
- [`gm_detour_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_detour_index.md)
  : Detour compactness score of a terra raster
- [`gm_directional_balance_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_directional_balance_index.md)
  : Directional balance index for a terra raster
- [`gm_exchange_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_exchange_index.md)
  : Exchange compactness score of a terra raster
- [`gm_geodesic_chord_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_geodesic_chord_index.md)
  : Geodesic chord index for a terra raster
- [`gm_geodesic_span_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_geodesic_span_index.md)
  : Geodesic span index for a terra raster
- [`gm_hull_ratio_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_hull_ratio_index.md)
  : Convex hull area ratio of a terra raster
- [`gm_moment_isotropy_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_moment_isotropy_index.md)
  : Moment isotropy index for a terra raster
- [`gm_moment_of_inertia_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_moment_of_inertia_index.md)
  : Polar moment-of-inertia compactness/dispersal index for a terra
  raster
- [`gm_polsby_popper_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_polsby_popper_index.md)
  : Polsby-Popper compactness score of a terra raster
- [`gm_radial_concentration_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_radial_concentration_index.md)
  : Radial concentration index for a terra raster
- [`gm_reock_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_reock_index.md)
  : Reock compactness score of a terra raster
- [`gm_shape_indices()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_shape_indices.md)
  : All indices (or a chosen subset) for a single terra raster
- [`gm_span_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_span_index.md)
  : Span index for a terra raster
- [`gm_width_length_ratio_index()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/gm_width_length_ratio_index.md)
  : Width-length ratio of a terra raster's bounding box
- [`opening()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/opening.md)
  : Morphological opening (erode then dilate) of a terra SpatRaster
- [`se_box()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/se_box.md) :
  Square structuring element
- [`se_diamond()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/se_diamond.md)
  : Diamond (L1/Manhattan ball) structuring element
- [`se_disc()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/se_disc.md)
  : Disc (Euclidean ball) structuring element
- [`tophat()`](https://nkaza.github.io/gridmorph/reference/tophat.md) :
  Top-hat (white-hat) transform of a terra SpatRaster
